member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.AttestationReporter
member.summary: Generates cryptographic attestation proofs of the boot chain and reports to external audit systems. Provides FIPS 140-2 and DISA STIG compliance-ready reports.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.AttestationReporter.GenerateBootChainAttestation(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Generates a cryptographic attestation proof of the boot chain.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.AttestationReporter.ReportToAuditSystem(System.String)
member.summary: Sends attestation report to external audit system.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.AttestationReporter.GenerateFIPS140_2ComplianceReport(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Generates a FIPS 140-2 compliance report.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.AttestationReporter.GenerateDISAStigComplianceReport(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Generates a DISA STIG compliance report.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.AttestationReporter.GetGeneratedReports
member.summary: Gets all generated reports.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.AttestationReporter.GetAttestationStatistics
member.summary: Gets attestation report statistics.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.BootComponentVerifier
member.summary: Implements zero-trust boot component verification. Verifies every bootloader, kernel module, and driver cryptographically. Maintains an audit log of all verifications for compliance.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.BootComponentVerifier.VerifyBootloaderComponent(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies a bootloader component with cryptographic signature verification.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.BootComponentVerifier.VerifyKernelModule(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies a kernel module with cryptographic signature verification.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.BootComponentVerifier.VerifyDriver(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies a driver with cryptographic signature verification.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.BootComponentVerifier.VerifyFirmware(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies firmware with cryptographic signature verification.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.BootComponentVerifier.GetAuditLog
member.summary: Gets the verification audit log.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.BootComponentVerifier.GetVerificationStatistics
member.summary: Gets verification statistics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.BootComponentVerifier.ExportAuditLogToCSV
member.summary: Exports audit log to compliance format.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing
member.summary: Manages encryption key sealing and unsealing in secure enclaves. Keys are sealed in SGX/SEV/TPM 2.0 enclaves and never exposed in main memory. Supports PCR (Platform Configuration Register) verification and automatic key rotation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing.SealKey(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Seals an encryption key in the secure enclave. The key is never exposed in main memory after sealing.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing.UnsealKey(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Unseals a key from the secure enclave after verifying PCR values.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing.RotateKey(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Rotates a key by generating a new one and re-sealing it.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing.IsKeyRotationRequired(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a key requires rotation based on age.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing.GetKeyMetadata(System.String)
member.summary: Gets information about a sealed key (without exposing the key itself).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing.GetSealedKeyIds
member.summary: Lists all sealed key IDs (without exposing the keys themselves).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing.PerformEnclaveSealing(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Performs the actual sealing operation in the enclave.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing.PerformEnclaveUnsealing(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Performs the actual unsealing operation in the enclave.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeySealing.VerifyPCRValues(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies PCR (Platform Configuration Register) values.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureBootstrap
member.summary: Implements enclave-based bootloader verification and boot integrity measurement. Provides cryptographic proof of boot integrity and seals secrets only if boot is valid.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureBootstrap.VerifyBootloader(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies and measures the bootloader component.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureBootstrap.VerifyKernel(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies and measures the kernel component.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureBootstrap.VerifyInitramfs(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies and measures the initramfs component.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureBootstrap.CompleteBootVerification
member.summary: Completes boot verification by computing the cumulative boot chain hash. This must be called after all components are verified.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureBootstrap.UnsealSecretWithBootAttestation(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Unseals a secret only if boot chain is verified.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureBootstrap.GetBootIntegrityReport
member.summary: Gets the boot integrity report.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureBootstrap.GetComponentMeasurements
member.summary: Gets detailed component measurements.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureBootstrap.IsBootVerified
member.summary: Checks if boot chain is verified.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureEnclaveManager
member.summary: Manages secure enclave operations with support for Intel SGX, AMD SEV, and TPM 2.0 fallback. Detects available security processors and loads sensitive operations into appropriate enclaves.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureEnclaveManager.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the secure enclave manager by detecting available hardware support.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureEnclaveManager.DetectIntelSGX
member.summary: Detects Intel SGX support via CPUID instruction. SGX is indicated by CPUID.07H:EBX[2]

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureEnclaveManager.DetectAMDSEV
member.summary: Detects AMD SEV (Secure Encrypted Virtualization) support. SEV support is indicated by CPUID.8000001FH:EAX[0]

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureEnclaveManager.DetectTPM20
member.summary: Detects TPM 2.0 support via Windows API.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureEnclaveManager.LoadOperationIntoEnclave(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Loads a sensitive operation into the appropriate secure enclave.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureEnclaveManager.GetEnclaveType
member.summary: Gets the detected enclave type.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureEnclaveManager.IsEnclaveAvailable
member.summary: Checks if enclave is initialized and available.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureEnclaveManager.GetLoadedOperations
member.summary: Gets list of loaded operations.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense
member.summary: Provides defenses against side-channel attacks including Spectre, Meltdown, timing attacks, and cache-based attacks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes side-channel defenses.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.EnableSpectreMitigation
member.summary: Enables Spectre (CVE-2017-5753, CVE-2017-5715) mitigation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.EnableMeltdownMitigation
member.summary: Enables Meltdown (CVE-2017-5754) mitigation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.EnableTimingDefense
member.summary: Enables timing attack resistance through randomization and constant-time operations.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.EnableCacheDefense
member.summary: Enables cache timing defense to prevent cache-based attacks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.ExecuteWithTimingDefense``1(System.Func{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Executes a function with constant-time defense against timing attacks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.ConstantTimeComparison(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Performs a constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.FlushCaches
member.summary: Flushes CPU caches to prevent cache-based attacks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.AccessMemoryConstantly(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Accesses memory in a constant pattern to prevent cache-based attacks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.GetMitigationStatus
member.summary: Gets the current status of all mitigations.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.GetTimingMetrics(System.String)
member.summary: Gets timing metrics for an operation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SideChannelDefense.DetectPotentialAttack(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Detects if the system is under a potential side-channel attack.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.TrustedComputingBase
member.summary: Measures and monitors the Trusted Computing Base (TCB) at each boot. Detects unauthorized modifications and alerts on any divergence from baseline.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.TrustedComputingBase.EstablishBaseline(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.Byte[],System.String}})
member.summary: Establishes the TCB baseline by measuring all components.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.TrustedComputingBase.MeasureTCB(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.Byte[],System.String}})
member.summary: Measures the current TCB state.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.TrustedComputingBase.GetTCBState
member.summary: Gets the current TCB state.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.TrustedComputingBase.GetDetectedAnomalies
member.summary: Gets detected anomalies.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.TrustedComputingBase.GetCriticalAnomalies
member.summary: Gets critical anomalies that require immediate attention.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.TrustedComputingBase.AcknowledgeAnomaly(System.String)
member.summary: Acknowledges an anomaly.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.TrustedComputingBase.GetTCBStatistics
member.summary: Gets TCB statistics.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest
member.summary: Manages a hardware-signed component manifest with version tracking and rollback protection. Ensures components cannot be rolled back to older, potentially vulnerable versions.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest.RegisterComponent(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Registers a component in the manifest with hardware signature.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest.UpdateComponent(System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Updates a component to a new version with rollback protection.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest.IsVersionRollback(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a version change would be a rollback.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest.GetComponent(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a component from the manifest.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest.GetAllComponents
member.summary: Gets all components in the manifest.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest.GetComponentVersionHistory(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the version history of a component.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest.VerifyManifestIntegrity(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies the integrity of the manifest.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest.ExportManifestToJSON
member.summary: Exports the manifest in compliance format.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.ZeroTrustManifest.GetManifestStatistics
member.summary: Gets manifest statistics.
